items.title: Publish WASM wheels to PyPI
items.oneliner: Step-by-step guide to ship Pyodide-compatible Python packages as WASM wheels directly through standard PyPI workflows.

items.title: Open weights coding model arrives
items.oneliner: Open-weight text model with strong coding benchmarks that practitioners are already testing as a closed-model alternative.

items.title: Run untrusted DuckDB SQL safely
items.oneliner: Practical security walkthrough for exposing DuckDB to untrusted SQL without relying on read_only=True alone.

items.title: Lock down PostgreSQL query execution
items.oneliner: Concrete recipe for running untrusted PostgreSQL queries with read-only roles and hard time limits.

items.title: Datasette gets an agent interface
items.oneliner: New Datasette agent release adds modular tooling for querying databases and building interactive data workflows.

items.title: Add access control to Datasette
items.oneliner: Alpha plugin update improves Datasette permission handling so teams can ship tighter row and app-level access rules.

items.title: Review giant GitHub diffs faster
items.oneliner: Swap github.com for diffshub.com to inspect huge PRs and commits without GitHub's sluggish diff viewer.

items.title: Fix stacked PRs with rebase
items.oneliner: Clear git rebase --onto tutorial for repairing child branches after squashing or rewriting parent pull requests.

items.title: Manage Hugo from Android
items.oneliner: Hands-on mobile workflow using Termux, Tasker, git, gh, and Hugo to edit and publish a site from Android.

items.title: Shrink NixOS ISO images
items.oneliner: Practical teardown of a 458MB NixOS ISO that shows exactly where the size comes from and how to cut it.
